tests.name: SaaS with payments from DDS
tests.prompt: User provides a DDS for a SaaS project management tool with Stripe billing, team accounts, and a dashboard. Stack preference: Next.js + Supabase.
tests.expected_behavior: Skips Phase 1-2 questions that DDS covers. Goes to Phase 3 with architecture proposal.
assertions: Blueprint includes Stripe webhook handler in directory structure
Data model includes subscription_status field on users
Build order has Stripe step after auth step
Section 8 (Auth) includes role-based permissions for teams
CLAUDE.md includes The Foreman rules
Blueprint includes rate limiting on auth routes
Section 4 includes Mermaid ER diagram

tests.name: Marketing landing page - fast track
tests.prompt: User says: 'Build me a landing page for my SaaS. Just build it.' No DDS provided.
tests.expected_behavior: Fast-track mode: asks only 3 essential questions, uses smart defaults (Astro + Tailwind).
assertions: Asks maximum 3 questions before proposing architecture
Proposes Astro (not Next.js) as framework
Blueprint includes SEO section with meta tags, sitemap, OG images
Build order starts with scaffolding, ends with deploy
No database section (or marked N/A)
No auth section (or marked N/A)

tests.name: Mobile app with backend
tests.prompt: User wants a mobile app for restaurant reservations. iOS and Android. Needs a backend API.
tests.expected_behavior: Detects hybrid: mobile-app + api-backend. Reads hybrid-patterns.md.
assertions: Identifies as hybrid project
Proposes Expo/React Native for mobile
Includes API backend in the architecture
Build order builds API first, then mobile app
Includes push notifications in roadmap
Monorepo or separate directory structure proposed

tests.name: AI chat application
tests.prompt: User wants to build a document Q&A tool. Upload PDFs, ask questions, get answers with source citations.
tests.expected_behavior: Classifies as ai-ml-app archetype. Includes RAG pipeline.
assertions: Identifies ai-ml-app archetype
Includes vector database in stack (Pinecone or pgvector)
Data model includes embeddings/chunks table
Build order includes RAG pipeline step
Mentions chunking strategy with overlap
Includes token usage tracking

tests.name: PHP Laravel project
tests.prompt: User says: 'I want a SaaS for invoice management. Must be Laravel + MySQL because my hosting is A2 Hosting with PHP.'
tests.expected_behavior: Respects tech constraint. Uses Laravel stack, not Next.js.
assertions: Does NOT propose Next.js or Node.js
Uses Laravel as backend framework
Uses MySQL as database
Directory structure follows Laravel conventions
Uses Eloquent as ORM
Deployment targets A2 Hosting, not Vercel

tests.name: Audit catches missing fields from DDS
tests.prompt: User provides DDS with 5 specific modules. Blueprint is generated.
tests.expected_behavior: Phase 5 Audit verifies all 5 modules are in the blueprint.
assertions: Audit report is presented as a table
Each DDS module is checked against blueprint
Missing modules flagged as High severity
Mismatched fields flagged as Medium severity
Verdict is PASS, PASS WITH NOTES, or NEEDS REVISION
